info.title: Shakermaker.SqlServer
info.description: Continuous Integration Tool for SQL Server

options.name: --application
options.description:
The application identifier for the deployment,
empty parameter is taken as "Main".

options.name: --release
options.description:
Required. The release identifier for the
deployment.

options.name: --environment
options.description:
Required. Deployment environment or stage e.g. dev
| qa | prod.

options.name: --source-directory
options.description:
The folder where the sql directory structure is
located

options.name: --connection-string
options.description:
Required. The SQL Server connection string where
the changes are going to be deployed.
